name: Grass
description: Open grassy ground for general exploration.

name: Meadow
description: A softer, brighter grassy field.

name: Forest Floor
description: Dark leafy ground beneath dense tree cover.

name: Moss
description: Soft moss-covered earth with cool green tones.

name: Tree
description: Dense tree cover that blocks movement.

name: Water
description: Deep water that cannot be walked across.

name: Shallow Water
description: Gentle water along a shore or stream edge.

name: Ice
description: Frozen water with pale blue tones.

name: Sand
description: Warm sandy ground for beaches and deserts.

name: Dirt
description: Packed dirt suitable for trails and worn areas.

name: Mud
description: Wet muddy ground with heavier brown tones.

name: Path
description: A simple footpath worn through the land.

name: Road
description: A broader built route through the world.

name: Bridge
description: Wooden bridge decking over water or a gap.

name: Stone
description: Neutral stone paving or exposed rock ground.

name: Rock
description: Solid rocky terrain that blocks movement.

name: Cliff
description: A steep cliff edge or wall of stone.

name: Wall
description: Built stone or brick wall that blocks passage.

name: Snow
description: Bright snowy ground with a crisp white-blue cast.

name: Lava
description: Molten lava that absolutely should not be walked on.

name: Swamp
description: Murky swamp ground in sickly green-brown tones.

name: Flowers
description: Flowering grassland with a warmer, brighter feel.
